text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Heehee! ♪ Oh, it's just so fun to race with
everyone!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: And! And! I think I've gotten stronger!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I can even keep up with everyone now! Isn't that
amazing?!
choice_data_list: Your efforts have finally paid off.
Your efforts have finally paid off.
You still have a long way to go!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I can even keep up with everyone now! Isn't that
amazing?!
choice_data_list: Your efforts have finally paid off.
Your efforts have finally paid off.
You still have a long way to go!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Yep, yep! I'm gonna get first place in this next
race for sure! I can sense it!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
So I better hurry up and prep for interviews! Hey,
Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Let's practice together! I'll take the role of the
host!
choice_data_list: Wait, I'm the one being interviewed?!
Wait, I'm the one being interviewed?!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! You got nothing to worry about! We'll
practice lots and lots!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Whoa! Scary! Wh-why do you say that?
choice_data_list: I'm trying to pump you up!
I'm trying to pump you up!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Oh! I've seen that on TV! You're like those
coaches telling me to give it my all! Gotcha!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Well, roger that! I'll try even harder! Giving it my
all is my specialty, after all!
